feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: How to bond with bats
entry.summary:
Author: Bunnyreader7397

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,248Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 99

Summary: Funny random one-offs of day-to-day life in the Bat family household. When the house can’t hold anymore, the chaos floods into Gotham from time to time.Basically, a place to just throw a bunch of silly little things for my head-canons. Request accepted.I don't currently have a beta, so I apologize if some grammar is fucked up. If you'd be interested in partnering, let me know.

entry.title: Heatwave
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,377Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 147

Summary: As Gotham swelters under a relentless summer heatwave, Jason Todd struggles to readjust to life at Wayne Manor, back under Bruce’s rules and back among family. The edges of it are starting to feel familiar again, but something between him and Dick Grayson has shifted, and as hot summer days fade into warm nights, the line between comfort and something deeper begins to blur.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,980Chapters: 11/16Kudos: 494

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: The Inheritance
entry.summary:
Author: HopelesslyObsessed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,001Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 145

Summary: They had an agreement that for Jason's sake, she'd keep her distance. But when he dies a few weeks short of his sixteenth birthday, it becomes her biggest regret. So, what if he'd had a crush on her? If only she'd been there, maybe things wouldn't have ended so tragically. She shouldn't have ever set foot in Gotham again, but Bruce was going down a dark path, and they both needed Joker to pay for what he did. The clown remains elusive, and she can't deny that Bruce's violence is rubbing off on her. When they finally catch him, things don't end well for any of them, and she's driven further than Bludhaven in search of herself. It starts as a cover, a cathartic act to help her work through her emotions, but her pain runs deeper, and the only relief she finds is in another young mercenary, who has almost as much as her to hide, and a similar taste in red.

entry.title: Moving Target
entry.summary:
Author: Toobizi

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,468Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 2,000

Summary: Just fucking fuck. Dick didn’t even do anything, so what the hell is wrong with him, spazzing out at nothing, at his first chance at a little fun. He imagines what he must have looked like through Dick's eyes and can vividly picture what he saw: Jason acting so scared and helpless and weak and stupid and—just—fucking —Goddamnit.Or, Jason isn't sleeping, Dick doesn't know what to do, and Tim just doesn't want to get shot at (again).

entry.title: Pinned Butterfly
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,834Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 376

Summary: Renegade was suave, dangerous, and inevitable. He was everything she feared but was inexorably drawn to. He was also the former Robin, Jason's predecessor, breaking off his path with Batman and the Teen Titans to pursue a life as a mercenary with Deathstroke as his mentor. For months, Jason had dallied and exchanged flirty quips with the villain on the field. But that had all been games. When Jason saw something she shouldn't have one night, she suddenly found herself Renegade's—Dick Grayson's—prisoner. aka. Like the story Renegade but with Jason having always been a girl.

entry.title: Situationship From Hell
entry.summary:
Author: birdwatching

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,482Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 242

Summary: She rolled her eyes, refusing to feel stupid for this. “You could at least be civil, asshole. We are technically siblings.” Dick’s taunting face suddenly turned cold and stony. “I’m not Bruce’s son. You’re not my sister. You’re just another orphan living in this house.”Her first meeting with Dick was something awkward and carefully orchestrated, but that’s usually the one that comes to mind most when she thinks about the beginning of their relationship.Jay thought it was a dream come true when she was picked up off the street by the richest guy in Gotham, especially when he proved himself to be a decent man. The only problem is the asshole who lives down the hall from her. Bruce and Dick had a good thing going for almost seven years before he decided to take in a random kid, and Dick makes his problem with it abundantly clear. She hits puberty eventually. (random updates)

entry.title: Baby Grayson-Wayne (Batcest Baby #1)
entry.summary:
Author: rhaellu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,002Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 48

Summary: Dick Grayson delivers their first baby and things are beginning to change for him and the Batfamily.He will face past lovers and the new public opinion on him while learning how to be a father with his partners.Damian is 17, Dick is 27, Bruce is 50 (physically de-aged from the previous Part), Jason is 25 and Tim is 21.{Tags will update with chapters}

entry.title: I can't help falling in love with you
entry.summary:
Author: borkbork52

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,801Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 104

Summary: Tim returns home after a Bad Time™ with Bernard thinking he's worthless only to discover just how much his family loves him (and then some) instead. A deep dive into consensual polycule Batfamily where the boys fall in love, seduce their dad, and make Gotham look good doing it.

entry.title: Blind Faith
entry.summary:
Author: dreamingvanity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 275,565Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 245

Summary: It's no one's fault but his own that Dick is sitting there now, cold and utterly miserable, and very close to freezing to death. It's no one's fault but his own that he let his heart and mind get away again. It's no one's fault but his own that he wanted for someone who couldn't and wouldn't be his, and Wally is right. Dick needs to get back to his life, start over and make new friends. That's all, nothing more and nothing less. Friends, Dick needs friends, and sadly (according to Wally), Krypto isn't enough.

entry.title: bottoms up (let's forget tonight)
entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,187Chapters: 9/14Kudos: 495

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: A Faulty Perception
entry.summary:
Author: idontknowwhatimdoinghalfthetime

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 744Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 54

Summary: “I killed him,” he croaks.“No, you didn’t.”He isn’t listening. Jason’s gaze hasn’t landed on the blood yet. The splatters staining pavement, the streaks along the walls.Hasn’t seen what’s lodged beneath chipped fingernails and speckled into hair. Hasn’t noticed the red coating his once-white sneakers.The killer's hands begin to tremble.“I killed him.”His hands begin to tremble._______________________________Heavily inspired from this fanart video: https://www.tiktok.com/@artbyhood/video/7551965194893790486?is_from_webapp=1&sender_device=pc&web_id=7639513374463788564Please read the tags :)Enjoy!

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,115Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.   (Guys I'm a child and I'm broke, I can't pay for comics or art. If you want to gift art, I'd be very happy to take it, and I also do art trades, but I cannot pay for services. Thank you.)

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,985Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 126

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: Boxed Cocksleeve
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,572Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 154

Summary: When he was inside the box, Jason couldn’t see, couldn’t move, could barely breathe. If he had an itch, he couldn’t scratch it (Jason hadn’t gotten a good scratch ever since getting his limbs removed). All he had were the dildos and vibrators stuffed in his holes and swelling up his womb, rubbing and rolling and sparking endless torturous pain against his sore innards, pressurizing him without ever getting him off. And with all his limbs gone, Jason couldn’t rub himself off, couldn’t do anything to alleviate the pain. His body modifications ensured Dick held the privilege to his every bodily function—orgasms, lactation, bathroom privilege, and even slick production. Jason was Dick’s little toy, and so he was for Dick to torture and to play with. But Dick has decided to remove Jason from the box today, which means Dick wants to play. Which also means Jason might just be lucky enough to be allowed an orgasm today.
